title: S.C.P. - Project ████████
description: An S.C.P. mod made by me :D
body:
# S.C.P. - Project ████████
A simple S.C.P. mod made by me (DragoneK)
## Current SCP Subjects
- SCP-500
  - Clears effects and gives regeneration.
- SCP-035
  - Changes the player to a mob with the mask on, then kills it after 3 minutes.
- SCP-999
  - If killed, gives 999 goo which you can eat for positive effects.
## WIP SCP Subjects
- SCP-173
  - Same as 096
- SCP-096
  - Will be added in the next update, but the looking mechanic will be added later.
- SCP-106
  - Will be added soon
- SCP-939
  - Might be added in the next update, but i have already made the model 2 times and deleted them accidentaly.
- SCP-513
  - I only need to make the model for the monster and i will add it.
- SCP-178
  - Same as 513.
## Other Features
- Keycards
  - Ranging from Janitor to O5
- SCP-999 Goo
  - Gives positive effects

If you have any suggestions, or want to help with the mod, contact me on discord - 5dragonek
